name: dnscat2-client
title: dnscat2-client
description:
DNS tunnel, the client part
This tool is designed to create an encrypted command-and-control (C&C) channel
over the DNS protocol, which is an effective tunnel out of almost every
network.
.
The client is designed to be run on a compromised machine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dnscat because DNS tunnel, the client part.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dnscat as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dnscat [options] [args]` as documented upstream for dnscat.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dnscat with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dnscat --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
